prompt: Create a hyperlink in cell A1 to https://www.example.com
Remove the hyperlink from cell A1
Add a comment to cell A1 with the text 'This is a comment'
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Delete the comment from cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Create a sparkline in cell C2 to show the trend of values in cells A2:A10
Add a sparkline to cell D2 to display the high and low points of the data in cells B2:B10
Set the page orientation to landscape for the current worksheet.
Set the top margin to 1 inch for the current worksheet.
Add a rectangle shape to cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Insert a circle shape in the top-right corner of the worksheet
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Set the page orientation to portrait for all worksheets in the workbook, except for the worksheet named 'Summary', which should be set to landscape.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Name | B1=Sales
Data:
A2:John | B2:100
A3:Jane | B3:200
Worksheets: Summary, Sales, Report

prompt: Set the left and right margins to 0.5 inches for all worksheets in the workbook, but only if the worksheet has more than 10 rows of data.
workbook:
Headers: A1=ID | B1=Description
Data:
A2:1 | B2:Item 1
A3:2 | B3:Item 2
... A12:11 | B12:Item 11
Worksheets: Products, Orders, Inventory

prompt: Set the header and footer margins to 0.25 inches for the current worksheet, and center the header and footer text.
Set the scale to 150% for all worksheets in the workbook, but only if the worksheet has a specific keyword 'Confidential' in the cell A1.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Confidential | B1=Project
Data:
A2:Project Name | B2:Top Secret
Worksheets: Project1, Project2, Public

prompt: Add a comment to the cell with the highest value in column A, with the text 'Max value in column A'
workbook:
Headers: A1=Value | B1=Category
Data:
A2:10 | B2:Cat1
A3:20 | B3:Cat2
A4:30 | B4:Cat3

prompt: Delete all comments from cells in the range A1:E5 that contain the text 'Old comment'
workbook:
Headers: A1=Col1 | B1=Col2 | C1=Col3 | D1=Col4 | E1=Col5
Data:
A2:val | B2:val | C2:val | D2:val | E2:val
A3:val | B3:val | C3:val | D3:val | E3:val

prompt: Update the comment in cell A1 to include the current date, if the comment already exists
workbook:
Headers: A1=Date | B1=Description
Data:
A2:2022-01-01 | B2:Comment exists

prompt: Copy the comment from cell A1 to all cells in the range B2:B5 that have the same value as cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=Value | B1=Category
Data:
A2:10 | B2:Cat1
A3:20 | B3:Cat2
A4:10 | B4:Cat1
A5:30 | B5:Cat3
